source_pr.title: binlog_test: fix unit test error in ci
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
This PR try to fix `binlog_test` radom failure.
The ci link is [error](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/25778/pipeline)

### What is changed and how it works?
add the wait time to check the last ddl binlog.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Release note

 - add the wait time to check the last ddl binlog.

symptoms: PR body: try to fix binlog_test random failure in CI by adding wait time
failure_signature: PR body: try to fix binlog_test random failure in CI by adding wait time
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing-sensitive asynchronous behavior (background tasks/events not fully settled). Fixed waits without polling/backoff are brittle under CI timing jitter. This PR stabilizes it by: binlog_test: fix unit test error in ci.
fix_pattern: binlog_test: fix unit test error in ci

evidence: evidence: PR body: try to fix binlog_test random failure in CI by adding wait time
evidence: increase sleep from 10ms to 30ms in mustGetDDLBinlog polling loop (sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go)
